programmes.show_description: Winston and Ben fight to save Jo's life; Teddy supports Link; Owen and Jules battle to save a young man; Lucas forms an unexpected bond with a patient.
As Public Eye climbs ever closer to News At Six's deteriorating numbers, Dale teams up with Rob, pushing the CEO to replace Lindsay.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Madonna makes a difficult call. Viv faces an impossible choice. Nicole takes the high road.
Abigail and Mali walk together on the beach, and Abigail tallies up their score on the magazine compatibility test.
The five best teams from last week tackle mini celebration cakes and a patisserie classic, the Les Misérables, before creating a grand pièce montée with two flavours of choux buns
Duncan and Liz build a revolutionary eco home in the picturesque Cotswolds. It will not only use very little energy, it'll also produce four times the energy it needs!
A Song for Europe: Dougal and Ted compete with their rivals on Rugged Island by writing a song to gain the dubious honour of representing Ireland in a Eurovision-style contest.
This week's dating line up includes Mim and Jack, Esther and Liam, Caoimhe and Will and Marcin and Cavan.
When a dubious opportunity presents itself to get out of an exam, the girls jump at the chance.
Episode Three features performances from CHALK, Miles Kane, Annie-Dog & Travy
The feud between Whitfield, Banner, and the Duttons reaches the point of no return.
Programmes start at 19:00.
Madonna cuts off her nose to spite her face. Viv has a heartbreaking realisation. Dawn scores a timely win.
Lacey runs into Tane and decides to fill him in on what's happening with Jo, since her sister hasn't made any effort to reach out to him herself.
You're Dead After School: When Fox's jilted boyfriend threatens to beat him up, Mark asks Pop to teach him to fight.
Lincolnshire: Lincolnshire is a county of farming innovation, where Rick Stein meets inventor James Dyson, who allows him special access to his farm of the future.
Northern Ireland: Amid Belfast's buzzy food scene, Rick Stein tucks into Filipino-style Sunday lunch.
Basque: Eva Longoria travels to the Basque Country where San Sebastian's imaginative cuisine reflects a proud cultural heritage and culinary mastery.
Idealistic Senate staffer Daniel J. Jones, tasked by his boss to lead an investigation into the CIA's post 9/11 Detention and Interrogation Program, uncovers shocking secrets.
